Name: EquipParamWeapon
Description:
Defines weapon types and each affinity.
Includes arrows and bolts. Responsible for scaling shown on certain consumables.
IDs not ending in a multiple of 100 are ignored.
Permitting affinities on a weapon without affinity rows at the correct IDs will result in the nearest 10000 being used.
SpEffects specified here can be modified by upgrades in ReinforceParamWeapon.

Fields.Name: Ultimate Charge A Part
Fields.Description: Fractional part of the charge value, used in combination with the B Part to calculate the total charge value.

Fields.Name: Ultimate Charge B Part
Fields.Description:
Base part of the ultimate charge.
If B >= 16, Charge = B + 0.125 × A.
If B < 16, Charge = 8 + 0.5 × B + 0.0625 × A.
There's a global multiplier of 0.9x to obtain the final in-game value.

Fields.Name: Ultimate Charge Exponent
Fields.Description: Base-4 exponent controlling the final scale of the ultimate charge. bias = 65, scale = 4^(exponent-65)

Fields.Name: Ultimate Charge Sign
Fields.Description: Sign of the charge value. 0 = +, 1 = -
